extension.description:
Zeus768 Kodi Addon Repository with auto-update detection.
Available Addons: - Genesis - Stream Movies and TV Shows with Debrid and Trakt - Genesis Skins - Theme packs for Genesis - SALTS (Stream All The Sources) - 120+ scrapers, Debrid, Trakt - Trakt Player - Click and Play, Debrid-powered - Orion - Media Explorer with Netflix-style UI - Poseidon Player - Premium IPTV Player with EPG - Poseidon Guide - EPG Grid for Poseidon Player - The Accountant - Auth Manager, Account Cards, Maintenance Suite - ResolveURL - URL Resolver Module
Auto-Update: Checks GitHub every 30 minutes for new commits and forces Kodi to refresh addon updates instantly.
